name: CompTIA Security+
description: Industry-standard certification covering network security, threats, vulnerabilities, cryptography, identity management, and risk management. Foundational credential for cybersecurity careers.

name: CompTIA Network+
description: Vendor-neutral networking certification covering protocols, routing, switching, infrastructure, and network troubleshooting. Complements Security+ with deep network fundamentals.

name: GICSP — Global Industrial Cyber Security Professional
description: Specialized certification for industrial control system (ICS) and operational technology (OT) security. Highly relevant to embedded systems and critical infrastructure research.
